allowed_capability_shape.loop_trigger_surface_missing: Represent whether a structured loop trigger surface exists, with evidence pointer or typed absence reason.
allowed_capability_shape.structured_tie_evidence_missing: Represent whether structured tie evidence exists, with evidence pointer or typed absence reason.
allowed_capability_shape.text_only_tie_residue: Represent detector text residue as insufficient unless promoted by structured evidence.

authority_boundary: This path may prepare a capability representation and review gates. It may not implement or activate runtime behavior until a later explicit implementation unit is authorized.
